languages.text: "Следи за своим тоном — я тебе не служка с нижних палуб, котор{mf|ого|ую} можно поучать".
"Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."
languages.original_text: "Следи за своим тоном — я тебе не служка с нижних палуб, котор{mf|ого|ую} можно поучать".

traits.locale_text: "Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."
"Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."
"Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."

languages.text: 「口調に気をつけなさい。私はあなたに説教される下級の労働者ではない」
languages.original_text: "Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."

languages.text: "Achtet auf Euren Ton ... ich bin {mf|kein Slave|keine Slavin} von den unteren Decks, {mf|dem|der} Ihr Vorträge halten könnt."
languages.original_text: "Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."

traits.locale_text: "Achtet auf Euren Ton ... ich bin {mf|kein Slave|keine Slavin} von den unteren Decks, {mf|dem|der} Ihr Vorträge halten könnt."

languages.text: «Vigile ese tono; no soy una rata de sentina a la que pueda sermonear».
languages.original_text: "Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."

traits.locale_text: «Vigile ese tono; no soy una rata de sentina a la que pueda sermonear».

languages.text: "Ses tonuna dikkat et. Ben senin ders verebileceğin alt güverte kölelerinden değilim."
languages.original_text: "Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."

traits.locale_text: "Ses tonuna dikkat et. Ben senin ders verebileceğin alt güverte kölelerinden değilim."

languages.text: « Surveillez votre ton. Je ne suis pas un larbin des ponts inférieurs à qui vous pouvez faire la leçon. »
languages.original_text: "Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."

traits.locale_text: « Surveillez votre ton. Je ne suis pas un larbin des ponts inférieurs à qui vous pouvez faire la leçon. »

languages.text: “说话注意分寸。我可不是任你教训的下层苦工。”
languages.original_text: "Watch your tone — I am not some lower-deck drudge to be lectured by you."

traits.locale_text: “说话注意分寸。我可不是任你教训的下层苦工。”
